metadata.short_desc: Track group message counts with leaderboards and scheduled push
metadata.desc: Track group member message counts. Supports total/daily/weekly/monthly/yearly leaderboards, LLM title generation, and scheduled push.

theme.hint: Visual theme for the leaderboard image. Overridden when auto theme switch is enabled.

auto_theme_switch.hint: Automatically switch between light/dark themes based on time of day.

detailed_logging_enabled.hint: Disable to reduce log verbosity. Only system-level and error logs will be kept.

rand.hint: Number of users shown in the leaderboard, recommended 5-50.

if_send_pic.hint: Image mode looks more beautiful; text mode uses fewer resources.

timer_enabled.hint: Automatically push leaderboard at the scheduled time.

timer_push_time.hint: Supports HH:MM format (daily at specific time) or cron format (e.g. '0 9 * * *' for daily 9 AM).

timer_target_groups.hint: Group IDs to receive scheduled pushes. Leave empty to push to all groups.

timer_rank_type.hint: Type of leaderboard for scheduled push.

milestone_enabled.hint: Automatically push when a user reaches a milestone message count.

milestone_targets.hint: Message counts that trigger milestone push, e.g. 666, 1000, 5000, 10000.

blocked_users.hint: Users excluded from statistics and leaderboards. Enter the full user ID.

blocked_groups.hint: Groups excluded from statistics. Enter the full group ID.

tg_bot_token.hint:
Fill in to display real TG user avatars. Leave empty for colored text avatars.

Why enter again?
AstrBot's architecture does not expose the adapter's Bot Token to plugins.
The plugin needs to call TG Bot API directly to fetch avatars, so an independent Token is required.

How to get: Create a Bot via @BotFather. Format: 123456:ABCdef...

dc_bot_token.hint:
Fill in to display real DC user avatars. Leave empty for colored text avatars.

Why enter again?
AstrBot's architecture does not expose the adapter's Bot Token to plugins.
The plugin needs to call Discord REST API directly to fetch avatars, so an independent Token is required.

How to get: Create a Bot in Discord Developer Portal.

llm_enabled.hint: Generate personalized titles for users using LLM during scheduled pushes.

llm_provider_id.hint: Select the LLM Provider for title generation. Leave empty for default session provider.

llm_system_prompt.hint: Customize title generation style and colors. Leave empty for default prompt.

llm_max_retries.hint: Number of retries when LLM call fails.

llm_min_daily_messages.hint: Users with daily messages below this threshold won't get titles. Set to 0 to analyze all users.

llm_enable_on_manual.hint: Also generate titles on manual queries (e.g. 'leaderboard', 'today'). Note: consumes Tokens.
